title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer (TypeScript, NestJS, React) – Remote (Turkey)
description: We’re Hiring: Senior Full-Stack Engineer (TypeScript / NestJS / React) We are looking for a Senior Full-Stack Engineer to contribute to the development and scaling of our legal case management platform’s backend, frontend, and cloud infrastructure. Key Responsibilities Design and develop core workflow, case, and task management systems Deliver AI-assisted features, including case summaries, legal Q&A, and structured outputs Own features end-to-end across backend and frontend Design and manage database schemas and production-safe migrations Improve reliability of asynchronous and event-driven processes (queues, retries, idempotency) Build and maintain integrations with external systems, including AWS services, Stripe, and HubSpot Technology Stack Backend: TypeScript, Node.js, NestJS, Prisma, MySQL Frontend: React 19, Vite, TanStack Router / Query / Table, Tailwind CSS Cloud & Infrastructure: AWS (S3, SQS, SNS, Lambda, Secrets Manager) Tooling: Jest, Vitest, ESLint, Prettier Qualifications 3+ years of professional software engineering experience Strong TypeScript expertise across backend and frontend Hands-on production experience with NestJS or equivalent Node.js architectures Strong React experience building data-intensive user interfaces Solid experience with relational databases, schema design, and migrations Proven ability to debug and operate asynchronous or distributed systems in production Clear written communication skills and a strong sense of ownership Preferred Experience Experience with legal-tech or workflow-heavy B2B SaaS platforms Stripe billing and payments implementation HubSpot or CRM system integrations Practical experience applying LLMs or prompt engineering in production environments How We Work Strong emphasis on ownership and pragmatic engineering standards Clear planning, checklist-driven execution, and fast iteration Focus on quality, reliability, and consistent delivery

title: Backend Engineer
description: At ING we encourage you to ` Do Your Thing ` to do more of what you love. We’re on a journey that’s centered around our customers, powered by technology and digital environment, driven by smart, determined people. Our customers feel our people are empowering them to stay a step ahead in life and in business. We’re proud of that! We want you to discover and develop yourself while developing others, be creative, be successful, excel at your career life, work agile so new ideas come to life faster! Interested? If you want to be the “Backend Developer” in our Technology Group; If you think you have most of the following qualifications; Bachelor’s degree in Computer Engineering, Electrical - Electronic Engineering, Mathematical Engineering, Management Informations Systems or related fields. Minimum 2 years experience for Core Banking System and minimum 3 years of software development experience . Knowledge of Treasury Derivatives/Finance is a plus. Experience with Java, Spring Boot, Microservice Architecture, Hibernate and JPA Proficient in Oracle PL/SQL. Strong communication (both verbal and written) and problem solving skills. Highly motivated in working with digital technologies. Knows and implements agile metadologies, Interested in learning new technologies. Excellent written and verbal English and Turkish communication skills. Fast learner, team-player and a good negotiator with analytical skills . If you think you may take charge of the following responsibilites; Understand user needs/demands and focus on the business outcome to develop or maintain codes. Maintaining and improving existing applications. Analyzing and solving production problems. Carry out technical design, coding, unit tests and technical documentation activities in accordance with compliance. What do we offer: At ING we want your work to fulfill you in every way, and that is why we take care of even the smallest detail. Check out what is waiting for you; You First Become Your True Self, Then an INGer: Flexible and hybrid working models , including remote options every third week of the month and during summer. 14 days of welcome leave in your first year—don’t wait to pursue your dreams! Continuous Growth and Development: Access to global and local learning opportunities through ING Academy, LearnUp , and certification programs with leading universities. Opportunities to contribute to innovative projects both locally and globally while advancing personally and professionally. Flexible career experiences await you through Short-Term Assignments (STA), Long-Term Assignments (LTA), Mini Career opportunities, Double Major (Çifte Kariyer), Turuncu Misafir, and Global STA/LTA programs , designed to enhance your skills and broaden your experience across different teams, departments, and international locations. When you step into a managerial role at ING, our exclusive RISE Leadership Program empowers you to lead with confidence. Centered around technology and people, RISE equips ING leaders with advanced skills and a strategic mindset to navigate and thrive in a dynamic environment. A Dynamic and Supportive Work Environment: An informal and collaborative culture where your ideas and innovations are valued. Social clubs, celebrations, and events to help you balance work and fun. We Care About You: Comprehensive health insurance for you and your loved ones. Private pension plans to help you achieve your future goals. On-site amenities like a gym, coffee shops, a hairdresser, and more to simplify your daily life. At ING, we’re dedicated to helping you achieve your goals by embracing flexibility, growth, and innovation. For more information about our Orange Culture , click here now: ***Candidates are expected not to share any sensitive personal data.

title: PHP Geliştirici
description: Next.js ve PHP (Laravel) Geliştirici Arıyoruz Esenler Giyimkent’te bulunan ofisimizde tam zamanlı çalışacak, Next.js frontend ve PHP (Laravel) backend tarafında görev alabilecek ekip arkadaşı arıyoruz. Aranan Nitelikler Next.js ile frontend geliştirme konusunda deneyim sahibi PHP ve Laravel ile backend geliştirme bilgisi API geliştirme ve frontend ile entegrasyon süreçlerine hakim MySQL veya benzeri veritabanlarıyla çalışma deneyimi Temiz ve sürdürülebilir kod yazma alışkanlığı olan Tercih Sebepleri Daha önce full stack projelerde görev almış olmak Tailwind veya benzeri CSS framework’leri ile çalışma deneyimi Performans ve optimizasyon konularında bilgi sahibi olmak SaaS veya çok tenantlı sistemlerde tecrübe Sorumluluklar Mevcut projelerin frontend ve backend geliştirme süreçlerinde aktif rol almak Yeni özellikler geliştirmek ve mevcut yapıyı iyileştirmek API geliştirme ve entegrasyon süreçlerini yürütmek Kod kalitesi ve performans konularına dikkat etmek Çalışma Şekli Esenler Giyimkent ofisinde tam zamanlı çalışma Uzun vadeli çalışma hedefi

title: Backend Developer
description: PlusMinusOne is a mobile startup studio that focuses on developing and marketing its own apps that are used and loved by millions of people around the world. Our products collectively reach more than a half-million new users every month in the US market alone. Our team works in hybrid model with offices in San Francisco and Istanbul. We have been building mobile products focused on Business, Photo & Video, and Education categories in the App Store mainly for the US market since 2016. And in each of these categories, our goal is the same: provide actual value to people with the best mobile user experience. We’re in an exciting period of growth and are looking for Backend Developer who will help us shape the future of mobile. What we are looking for: BS or MS degree in Computer Science, Engineering or related field 2+ years of experience in software engineering Preferably proficient with Node.js, designing and developing REST APIs, AWS environment, CDN (Amazon Cloudfront etc.) experienced in technologies. Good understanding of OOP, Design Patterns, Clean Code concepts Good understanding of fundamental design principles for a scalable application Experience with both relational and non relational databases Experience designing and implementing CI/CD pipelines Experience in applying AI to real world problems Experience in python and python virtual environments Experience in deploying deep learning models on cloud platforms in a scalable way Understanding basic concepts about deep learning, computer vision, large language models Strong analytical and time management skills Experience with working in an agile environment Your responsibilities will be: Developing backend services for our mobile apps from the ground up Refine, and tune integrations between applications Bring new technology and ideas to the table Influence cross-team initiatives and mentor mind and junior backend engineers Participate in planning meetings, estimate tasks, do code reviews, and code in pairs Deploy, optimize and scale deep learning models What we offer: Opportunity to make an impact on millions of global users' life and the future of mobile Chance to be a part of a passionate and driven team where everyone’s ideas are valued A hybrid work environment with 3 days a week at the Kabataş Istanbul office Extra 5 days of PM1 paid vacation from the first year, increasing with seniority Performance-based bonus paid twice a year Ability to own a stock option after the first year Private health insurance package Lunch and transportation allowance Reimbursement package for any education, course, sports activities, hobbies, etc. A Macbook, iPhone, magic mouse, magic keyboard, and any other hardware that you need to deliver your best work. Let's shape the future of mobile together!

title: Open Source Contributor — Backend & Developer Tools
description: Company Description RapidKit is an open-source workspace platform for backend engineering that standardizes how teams build, scale, and deploy production-ready backend services. Built for modern engineering teams, RapidKit introduces a workspace-first architecture combining automation, governance, and clean project structure across the backend lifecycle. RapidKit supports Python, Node.js, and Go, enabling developers to build scalable polyglot services without configuration drift or repetitive boilerplate. Our mission is simple: help developers build faster, scale smarter, and deploy with confidence. Role Description This is an open-source contributor role within the RapidKit ecosystem. You will work alongside RapidKit maintainers and contributors to help shape the future of workspace-based backend engineering. Contributors directly influence architecture decisions, developer experience, and tooling used by real engineering teams.. This is a community-driven, unpaid volunteer position, ideal for developers who want to: Gain real-world open-source experience Contribute to an actively evolving developer platform Work on modern backend infrastructure and tooling Responsibilities Contribute code, ideas, or improvements to RapidKit open-source projects Collaborate with maintainers and community contributors Improve developer experience and tooling reliability Participate in technical discussions and architecture decisions Assist with documentation, examples, and developer onboarding Areas of Contribution Backend integrations (FastAPI, NestJS, Go) CLI & developer tooling VS Code extension development Workspace architecture evolution Documentation & developer experience Testing, automation, and CI workflows Qualifications Interest in backend engineering or developer tooling Experience with Python, Node.js, or Go Familiarity with Git and open-source collaboration workflows Comfortable working in Linux-based development environments Strong problem-solving mindset Previous open-source contributions are a plus — not required . Additional Information This opportunity represents open-source collaboration, not traditional employment. The role is unpaid and focused on learning, collaboration, and community contribution within the RapidKit ecosystem. Outstanding contributors may be invited to join future paid core-team or partner opportunities as RapidKit grows. How to Apply Instead of sending a traditional resume, contributors can start by: 1. Exploring the RapidKit repository 2. Picking a "good first issue" 3. Submitting a pull request or proposal GitHub → https://github.com/getrapidkit/rapidkit Why Contribute to RapidKit? RapidKit is building an open workspace standard for backend development. Contributors gain experience working on: Real-world developer tooling CLI and IDE ecosystem design Multi-runtime backend architecture Production-grade open-source infrastructure Your contributions will be publicly visible and used by developers worldwide.

title: Backend Developer
description: Nuevo Softwarehouse olarak işbirliği içerisinde olduğumuz ve Enerji sektöründe faaliyet gösteren kurumumuzun projelerinde görev almak üzere "Junior-Mid Level" seviyesinde "Backend Developer" takım arkadaşı arayışımız bulunmaktadır. İlgili adayların başvurularını beklemekteyiz. Genel Nitelikler: 1-4 yıl arası tecrübeli, ASP.NET Core 6+ teknolojilerinde geliştirme yapmış, MSSQL geliştirme konularında çalışmış, Mikroservis proje yapıları hakkında bilgisi olan, Git, DevOps, CI/CD pipeline yapısında yürütülen projelerde aktif rol almış, Unit Test geliştirme konusunda tecrübeli, Agile projelerde çalışmış,

title: Senior Full Stack Java Developer
description: We are one of the leading Management & Technology Consulting firm in Turkish Financial Services Sector and we would like to strengthen our High Performing Team consisting of a wide range of -Talents- from new graduates to experienced professionals. If you believe that this is the right time to challenge yourself, you are very welcome to our Team! We are currently seeking " Senior Java Developer (Remote / Hybrid) ". QUALIFICATIONS Bachelor’s or Master’s Degree in Computer Science or related field from a reputable university Proven experience on Java and its ecosystems, Proven experience on popular frameworks or concepts such as Spring Boot, Spring MVC, React, Git, Hibernate, RESTful, SOAP, Knowledge of RDBMS (Oracle, SQL Server), Experience leveraging design patterns and software engineering best practices for a full stack software development life cycle of enterprise applications, Experience with CI/CD tools (Jenkins..), version control tools (BitBucket, Git…), managing and tracking work using management tools like JIRA, Experience in following and promoting Agile practices, TDD, BDD, Understanding of common offerings by cloud providers (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud…), cloud native principles and cloud services to propose scalable solutions, Experience on finance and banking sector is a plus, Good command of spoken and written English. JOB DESCRIPTION Guide developers, create and review technical designs, create and review design patterns, Oversee the design and development of software and infrastructure components, Responsible for the analysis of new and emerging technologies, Lead multiple migrations from applications to microservices cloud-based applications, Create and maintain architecture, provide guidance and technical expertise an develop and maintain the technology roadmap, Lead the development of new concepts to support the business strategy and provide recommendations to leverage technology, Develop, create, and modify software applications or specialized programs in accordance with applicable software development methodology, meeting code quality metrics, Produce specifications and user documentation on software applications being developed.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: We have come a long way from being an ambitious start-up to becoming a fully export-oriented offshore development center serving a long list of prestigious clients across the globe; enriching our experience, expertise, and portfolio along the way. After a humble start with open source technologies, we worked our way up into becoming an authority on a number of key fields- the development of large enterprise applications, mobile applications, applications that facilitate hardware-software interaction to name a few. Following the motto “Consistently delivering quality solutions”, our team currently has 10 exclusive niche techies, with 100+ successful projects under their belts, covering a very wide range of technologies, solutions, and industry verticals. We are looking for a Full Stack Developer to join Path team. Requirements 4+ years of professional software development experience Deep understanding and demonstrated expeRedise in .Net Framework and C# libraries Vue.js knowledge is must Expert in .Net Technologies (MVC, Web Forms) and C# language Experience in RESTful & SOAP service technologies Knowledge of object-oriented programming Experience in relational databases, ability to write functions Capable of writing unit tests Deep understanding of Microservices Technologies Nice to have Experience with MySQL, PostgreSQL Experience with Websocket Experience with Elastic Search, Redis, Docker Experience with Cloud technologies

title: Senior Backend Developer (Java)
description: Join the Minds Behind the Future of Tech! At Mobven, we are committed to building high-quality digital products that transform industries. Founded in 2012, we evolved from a promising startup into an award-winning technology company, recognized by Deloitte as one of the EMEA region’s fastest-growing tech firms—four years in a row. Our expertise in mobile technology and digital transformation has made us a trusted partner for global enterprises. We are looking for individuals who take pride in their craft, push their work to the highest standards, and thrive in a culture of excellence. If you are someone who values expertise, precision, and innovation and is eager to contribute to groundbreaking digital solutions that shape the future of technology, join us at Mobven. Be part of a team where your skills, dedication, and passion will be recognized, challenged, and elevated to new height. Key Responsibilities Develop and maintain for area-specific digital banking products such as Customer Acquisition Processes, Digital Onboarding, Video Banking and Video Chat Solutions, Design, develop, and maintain highly available, scalable, and secure backend services supporting both web and mobile applications, Design and implement RESTful APIs used by mobile SDKs, frontend applications, and third-party systems, Contribute to architectural decisions with a focus on performance, security, scalability, and maintainability in mobile and distributed environments, Participate in code reviews, ensuring clean code, best practices, and high-quality standards, Actively follow technological developments and adopt new software development tools, frameworks, and methodologies into projects, Support CI/CD pipelines and contribute to automated testing and deployment processes, Collaborate closely with mobile, frontend, and platform teams to deliver end-to-end solutions, Analyze production issues, perform root cause analysis, and contribute to continuous system improvements, Required Skills and Experiences BS or MS in Computer Engineering or Software Engineering, Minimum 5+ years of professional software development experience, Solid knowledge of Java, Spring Boot, Maven, Hibernate/JPA, Strong understanding of object-oriented programming (OOP) and design patterns, Experience in RESTful API design and service-oriented architecture (SOA), Experience with microservices and distributed systems architectures, Experience in developing backend services for mobile applications, Hands-on experience with relational database systems (preferably Oracle), Preferably experience or strong interest in WebRTC and real-time communication technologies. Familiarity with cloud-based application architectures, Preferably knowledgeable about JavaScript frameworks (React.js, etc.), Experience with messaging systems such as Kafka or RabbitMQ and caching technologies like Redis, Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines and test-oriented development practices (TDD, unit and integration testing), Experience with container technologies (Docker, Kubernetes) is a plus, Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills, Team-oriented mindset with strong communication skills, Eager to learn, adapt, and take ownership of responsibilities, Creative, proactive, and result-oriented approach to work. Technologies: Java, Spring, Hibernate, SpringBoot, Redis, Docker, Kubernetes, Kafka/RabbitMQ, Elasticsearch & Kibana, C#, What We Offer Health Insurance Meal card Transport Allowance Training Budget Gift Card Birthday Leave Happy Hour

title: Senior Backend Developer (Node.js)
description: Who We Are At Mobiversite, we don’t just build apps — we craft digital experiences used by millions of people worldwide. Our products combine creativity, technology, and data to create scalable, high-impact digital solutions. We’re looking for an experienced Senior Backend Developer (Node.js) who is passionate about building reliable backend systems and scalable services that power high-volume mobile and web applications. What You’ll Do Design, develop, and maintain robust, scalable backend systems using Node.js. Collaborate closely with frontend and mobile teams to integrate user-facing elements with server-side logic. Build, maintain, and optimize RESTful APIs and backend services . Ensure high performance, availability, and scalability of applications. Design and manage database schemas and data models , working with both SQL and NoSQL databases. Monitor, troubleshoot, and debug backend systems to ensure smooth operation. Contribute to architectural decisions and continuously improve backend infrastructure and code quality. What We’re Looking For Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Computer Engineering , or a related field. 5+ years of hands-on experience developing backend systems using Node.js. Strong expertise in Node.js, Express.js , and modern backend frameworks. Solid understanding of REST API design and development . Experience with PostgreSQL, and/or MySQL . Familiarity with cloud infrastructure , preferably AWS . Strong knowledge of JavaScript (ES6+) and asynchronous programming patterns. Understanding of software engineering best practices, including clean code, OOP principles, and design patterns . Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work independently in a fast-paced environment. What We Offer Competitive Salary: A compensation package that’s aligned with the market and your experience Top-Line Equipment: Latest MacBooks, plus all the accessories and software you need to succeed in your role Private Medical Insurance: We go above and beyond when it comes to your health Celebrations: Special birthday coupons to celebrate you Transportation Allowance: Monthly commute support Meal Allowance: Monthly meal support Monthly Motivation Package: A dedicated budget to keep you inspired and energized Salary Reviews: Twice a year Performance Bonus: Rewarding impact and results
